sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2435" key="ai(matourgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἱμᾰτουργός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n2435.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">murderous</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἄρεος δύναμις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:3:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
